'''鈭歯g-l-th''' ('''ngalatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weede|weede]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weede|weede]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-l-th
|-
! Lemma
| ngalatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngalathithi|ngalathithi]] || [[word:ngalathiji|ngalathiji]] || [[word:ngalathishi|ngalathishi]] || [[word:ngalathi|ngalathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalathuthuth|ngalathuthuth]] || [[word:ngalathujuj|ngalathujuj]] || [[word:ngalathushush|ngalathushush]] || [[word:ngalath|ngalath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngalathuthu|ngalathuthu]] || [[word:ngalathuju|ngalathuju]] || [[word:ngalathushu|ngalathushu]] || [[word:ngalathu|ngalathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalathufuth|ngalathufuth]] || [[word:ngalathufuj|ngalathufuj]] || [[word:ngalathufush|ngalathufush]] || [[word:ngalathuf|ngalathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngalathethe|ngalathethe]] || [[word:ngalatheje|ngalatheje]] || [[word:ngalatheshe|ngalatheshe]] || [[word:ngalathe|ngalathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalathothoth|ngalathothoth]] || [[word:ngalathojoj|ngalathojoj]] || [[word:ngalathoshosh|ngalathoshosh]] || [[word:ngalath|ngalath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngalathotho|ngalathotho]] || [[word:ngalathojo|ngalathojo]] || [[word:ngalathosho|ngalathosho]] || [[word:ngalatho|ngalatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalathofoth|ngalathofoth]] || [[word:ngalathofoj|ngalathofoj]] || [[word:ngalathofosh|ngalathofosh]] || [[word:ngalathof|ngalathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngalath忙th忙|ngalath忙th忙]] || [[word:ngalath忙j忙|ngalath忙j忙]] || [[word:ngalath忙sh忙|ngalath忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngalath忙|ngalath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalathathath|ngalathathath]] || [[word:ngalathajaj|ngalathajaj]] || [[word:ngalathashash|ngalathashash]] || [[word:ngalath|ngalath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngalathatha|ngalathatha]] || [[word:ngalathaja|ngalathaja]] || [[word:ngalathasha|ngalathasha]] || [[word:ngalatha|ngalatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalathafath|ngalathafath]] || [[word:ngalathafaj|ngalathafaj]] || [[word:ngalathafash|ngalathafash]] || [[word:ngalathaf|ngalathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngalathasha|ngalathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongalathasha|gongalathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingalathasha|gokingalathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngalathn眉sha|ngalathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongalathnkn眉sha|gongalathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingalathn眉sha|gokingalathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngalathsh毛sha|ngalathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongalathnksh毛sha|gongalathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingalathsh毛sha|gokingalathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngalathrosha|ngalathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongalathnkrosha|gongalathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingalathrosha|gokingalathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalathmusha|ngalathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongalathnkmusha|gongalathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalathmusha|gokingalathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngalathsherasha|ngalathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongalathnksherasha|gongalathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingalathsherasha|gokingalathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngalathngasha|ngalathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongalathnkngasha|gongalathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingalathngasha|gokingalathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngalathyasha|ngalathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongalathnkyasha|gongalathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingalathyasha|gokingalathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngalathyamasha|ngalathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongalathnkyamasha|gongalathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingalathyamasha|gokingalathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngalathn眉sh毛sha|ngalathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongalathnkn眉sh毛sha|gongalathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingalathn眉sh毛sha|gokingalathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngalathn眉rosha|ngalathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongalathnkn眉rosha|gongalathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingalathn眉rosha|gokingalathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalathn眉musha|ngalathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongalathnkn眉musha|gongalathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalathn眉musha|gokingalathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngalathsh毛n眉sha|ngalathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongalathnksh毛n眉sha|gongalathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingalathsh毛n眉sha|gokingalathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngalathsh毛rosha|ngalathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongalathnksh毛rosha|gongalathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingalathsh毛rosha|gokingalathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalathsh毛musha|ngalathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongalathnksh毛musha|gongalathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalathsh毛musha|gokingalathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngalathron眉sha|ngalathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongalathnkron眉sha|gongalathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingalathron眉sha|gokingalathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngalathrosh毛sha|ngalathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongalathnkrosh毛sha|gongalathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingalathrosh毛sha|gokingalathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalathromusha|ngalathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongalathnkromusha|gongalathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalathromusha|gokingalathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngalathmun眉sha|ngalathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongalathnkmun眉sha|gongalathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingalathmun眉sha|gokingalathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngalathmush毛sha|ngalathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongalathnkmush毛sha|gongalathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingalathmush毛sha|gokingalathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngalathmurosha|ngalathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongalathnkmurosha|gongalathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingalathmurosha|gokingalathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngalath|ngalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙l忙th|ng忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongalath|hongalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙l忙th|hong忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongalath|hohongalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙l忙th|hohong忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngalath|n眉ngalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙l忙th|n眉ng忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngalath|n眉n眉ngalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙l忙th|n眉n眉ng忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngalath|n茂ngalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙l忙th|n茂ng忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngalath|n茂n茂ngalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙l忙th|n茂n茂ng忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungalath|lungalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙l忙th|lung忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungalath|lulungalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙l忙th|lulung忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingalath|lingalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙l忙th|ling忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingalath|lilingalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙l忙th|liling忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongalath|kongalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙l忙th|kong忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongalath|kokongalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙l忙th|kokong忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengalath|kengalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙l忙th|keng忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengalath|kekengalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙l忙th|kekeng忙l忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
